name: Study 5: Recurrent MACE Incidence by Age Group — Clopidogrel vs Aspirin
description: Age-stratified MACE recurrence comparing clopidogrel and aspirin post-MI arms.

design_json.description: Age-stratified recurrent MACE incidence across both post-MI antiplatelet arms (clopidogrel vs aspirin). Older patients carry higher baseline MACE risk; age stratification quantifies absolute event rate differences between treatment arms.
